DOM_Hierarchy.Collision_Logic: CSS Grid with 12-column span logic prevents card overlapping.
Bottom-right offset (right: 32, bottom: 10) to avoid mascot collision.
Highest priority, covers bottom-right corner when active.

Grid_System.Desktop_Logic: 4-span items (3 per row) or 8-span large cards.

Chatbot_Logic.Identity: Lanazrion la Gardienne (Warmth of Lana + Precision of Azrion)

State_Management.Open_Close: React useState (isChatOpen) with Framer Motion AnimatePresence
State_Management.Learning_Storage: Logs array filtered by source 'TERMINAL', persistent during session.
State_Management.Context_Awareness: Tracks active pole (CERVEAU, COEUR, MUSCLE) to tailor responses.

Conversational_Flow.Welcome_Script: Miaou ! Oh, quel plaisir de vous voir à Kaleidoland ! ✨🐾 Ici, on fait grandir vos projets dans la sérénité...

Conversion_Path.Step_1: User engages with Lanazrion (Chatbot) to define project éclat.
Conversion_Path.Step_2: Lanazrion validates vision and identifies technical/strategic needs.
Conversion_Path.Step_3: Proactive CTA: Suggests PDF Manifest or RDV in Dashboard.
Conversion_Path.Step_4: Final Push: Direct link to 'LANCER' (Synode Dashboard) for full audit activation.
